item.title:
當你的 AI Chatbot 還在重複回答同一堆 FAQ，客戶談了兩分鐘就離開。而他們最想表達的需求，就這樣一併消失了。
成功的 AI Chatbot 不只能節省成本。還是你最強大的客戶聲音收集工具...
item.description: 當你的 AI Chatbot 還在重複回答同一堆 FAQ，客戶談了兩分鐘就離開。而他們最想表達的需求，就這樣一併消失了。 成功的 AI Chatbot 不只能節省成本。還是你最強大的客戶聲音收集工具。 很多企業都忽略了一件事：Chatbot 不單在提供資訊，——而是客戶在告訴你，他們真正需要的是什麼。 Anthropic——Claude AI 的母公司——選擇了 Intercom Fin 作為自己的客服方案。不是因為他們無法自行開發，而是因為大規模的客戶服務，單靠一個好的 AI 模型並不足夠。 你的 Chatbot 應該在收集客戶心聲，而不是把客戶趕走。 5月27日 · 下午2–5時 · 中環 · 20個名額 嘉賓：Charmaine M. — Intercom 亞太區合作夥伴主管 如果你的 AI Chatbot 正在流失客戶而不是了解客戶，這就是你需要參與的對話。 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #Intercom hashtag #HongKong
item.content:encoded: 當你的 AI Chatbot 還在重複回答同一堆 FAQ，客戶談了兩分鐘就離開。而他們最想表達的需求，就這樣一併消失了。 成功的 AI Chatbot 不只能節省成本。還是你最強大的客戶聲音收集工具。 很多企業都忽略了一件事：Chatbot 不單在提供資訊，——而是客戶在告訴你，他們真正需要的是什麼。 Anthropic——Claude AI 的母公司——選擇了 Intercom Fin 作為自己的客服方案。不是因為他們無法自行開發，而是因為大規模的客戶服務，單靠一個好的 AI 模型並不足夠。 你的 Chatbot 應該在收集客戶心聲，而不是把客戶趕走。 5月27日 · 下午2–5時 · 中環 · 20個名額 嘉賓：Charmaine M. — Intercom 亞太區合作夥伴主管 如果你的 AI Chatbot 正在流失客戶而不是了解客戶，這就是你需要參與的對話。 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #Intercom hashtag #HongKong

item.title:
When your AI gets 'too' helpful - and you're not even mad about it. 🙂
Honestly? We love this energ...
item.description: When your AI gets 'too' helpful - and you're not even mad about it. 🙂 Honestly? We love this energy. 🌟 A customer asked McDonald's AI for Python help — and it delivered. Correctly. Then asked if you wanted McNuggets. 🍟 🍔 That's not a failure. That's a bot that went beyond its job description — and left the customer delighted and slightly confused. The best customer AI doesn't just answer the question in front of it. It reads the moment, surprises you, and still closes the loop on what actually matters. That's the bar we build toward at DAL — AI that earns a screenshot. What's the most unexpectedly helpful thing an AI has done for you? Drop it below 👇 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AIchatbot hashtag #CX hashtag #Intercom hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #HongKongTech hashtag #DAL hashtag #MarTech hashtag #AIexceedsexpectations
item.content:encoded: When your AI gets 'too' helpful - and you're not even mad about it. 🙂 Honestly? We love this energy. 🌟 A customer asked McDonald's AI for Python help — and it delivered. Correctly. Then asked if you wanted McNuggets. 🍟 🍔 That's not a failure. That's a bot that went beyond its job description — and left the customer delighted and slightly confused. The best customer AI doesn't just answer the question in front of it. It reads the moment, surprises you, and still closes the loop on what actually matters. That's the bar we build toward at DAL — AI that earns a screenshot. What's the most unexpectedly helpful thing an AI has done for you? Drop it below 👇 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AIchatbot hashtag #CX hashtag #Intercom hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #HongKongTech hashtag #DAL hashtag #MarTech hashtag #AIexceedsexpectations

item.title: 351,000 GitHub stars. 3.2 million monthly active users. More popular than React ever was. Then HKCER...
item.description: 351,000 GitHub stars. 3.2 million monthly active users. More popular than React ever was. Then HKCERT issued a security advisory. OpenClaw（龍蝦）is the fastest-growing open-source AI agent in history. It can read your email, browse the web, control your files, and message your customers on WhatsApp — all autonomously. But Palo Alto Networks flagged what they called a "lethal trifecta": access to private data, exposure to untrusted content, and the ability to take external actions with persistent memory. For Hong Kong enterprises handling customer data across regulated industries — this isn't a toy. We broke down what OpenClaw actually does, the 9 CVEs discovered so far, and what enterprises should consider before deploying any AI agent. Full breakdown 👇 https://hubs.la/Q04cgHb30 hashtag #OpenClaw hashtag #AIAgents hashtag #HongKong hashtag #EnterpriseAI hashtag #CustomerIntelligence
item.content:encoded: 351,000 GitHub stars. 3.2 million monthly active users. More popular than React ever was. Then HKCERT issued a security advisory. OpenClaw（龍蝦）is the fastest-growing open-source AI agent in history. It can read your email, browse the web, control your files, and message your customers on WhatsApp — all autonomously. But Palo Alto Networks flagged what they called a "lethal trifecta": access to private data, exposure to untrusted content, and the ability to take external actions with persistent memory. For Hong Kong enterprises handling customer data across regulated industries — this isn't a toy. We broke down what OpenClaw actually does, the 9 CVEs discovered so far, and what enterprises should consider before deploying any AI agent. Full breakdown 👇 https://hubs.la/Q04cgHb30 hashtag #OpenClaw hashtag #AIAgents hashtag #HongKong hashtag #EnterpriseAI hashtag #CustomerIntelligence

item.title: 接財納福 · 智繪增長 DAL 以 AI 驅動的自動化行銷與精準轉化方案，助您精準捕獲商機，實現業績翻倍成長。

item.title:
Wrapping Up! AI & U: Defining the Future of Work 🚀
Body: What an incredible turnout at the Master C...
item.description: Wrapping Up! AI & U: Defining the Future of Work 🚀 Body: What an incredible turnout at the Master Concept HK Solution Day! A huge thank you to the hundreds of industry leaders who joined us at HKCEC to explore our theme: "AI & U." From the packed keynote sessions to the buzzing hands-on workshops, one thing is clear: AI isn't just a tool—it is the engine empowering the workforce ("U") and redefining customer experiences. Key Takeaways: ✅ Google Cloud revealed the roadmap to 2026. ✅ The Security Series proved that safety starts with human behavior, not just tools. ✅ AI Agents are shifting customer service from reactive to proactive. ✅ Geospatial with AI unlocked tremendous possibilities Missed the event? Stay tuned as we recap the key insights from our partners over the coming days! hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HKSolutionDay hashtag #AIandU hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #EventRecap
item.content:encoded: Wrapping Up! AI & U: Defining the Future of Work 🚀 Body: What an incredible turnout at the Master Concept HK Solution Day! A huge thank you to the hundreds of industry leaders who joined us at HKCEC to explore our theme: "AI & U." From the packed keynote sessions to the buzzing hands-on workshops, one thing is clear: AI isn't just a tool—it is the engine empowering the workforce ("U") and redefining customer experiences. Key Takeaways: ✅ Google Cloud revealed the roadmap to 2026. ✅ The Security Series proved that safety starts with human behavior, not just tools. ✅ AI Agents are shifting customer service from reactive to proactive. ✅ Geospatial with AI unlocked tremendous possibilities Missed the event? Stay tuned as we recap the key insights from our partners over the coming days! hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HKSolutionDay hashtag #AIandU hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #EventRecap

item.title: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic."...
item.description: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic." It was "AI Visibility." Just wrapped up an incredible executive session with Amplitude. The energy in the room was electric, but the post-event data tells the real story. We surveyed our guests—leaders from Finance, Retail, and Tech—on their #1 priority for 2026. The overwhelming winner? Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). The realization is hitting hard: ❌ Ranking #1 on Google doesn't matter if ChatGPT answers the user's question without a click. ✅ The new battleground is ensuring your brand is "visible" and "recommended" by AI agents. A huge thank you to everyone who joined the conversation. The shift from "Search" to "Answer" is here, and today proved that Hong Kong's top enterprises are ready to tackle it. Missed the session? We are opening up 5 more slots for the Custom AI Visibility Audit (the same one our guests received). Comment "VISIBILITY" below, and I’ll DM you the details. James B. Lindsay Baljin S. Amelia Xu Ai Nico Ng hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #GEO hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #DataAnalytics
item.content:encoded: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic." It was "AI Visibility." Just wrapped up an incredible executive session with Amplitude. The energy in the room was electric, but the post-event data tells the real story. We surveyed our guests—leaders from Finance, Retail, and Tech—on their #1 priority for 2026. The overwhelming winner? Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). The realization is hitting hard: ❌ Ranking #1 on Google doesn't matter if ChatGPT answers the user's question without a click. ✅ The new battleground is ensuring your brand is "visible" and "recommended" by AI agents. A huge thank you to everyone who joined the conversation. The shift from "Search" to "Answer" is here, and today proved that Hong Kong's top enterprises are ready to tackle it. Missed the session? We are opening up 5 more slots for the Custom AI Visibility Audit (the same one our guests received). Comment "VISIBILITY" below, and I’ll DM you the details. James B. Lindsay Baljin S. Amelia Xu Ai Nico Ng hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #GEO hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #DataAnalytics

item.title:
The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war?
It’s the nightmare scena...
item.description: The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war? It’s the nightmare scenario for every digital leader: You rank #1 on Google, but your traffic is flat. Why? Because the user never clicked. They got their answer from an AI summary and moved on. The data confirms the shift: 📉 Zero-click searches are skyrocketing. 📉 CTRs are plummeting as AI overviews take over. 📉 80% of consumers (Bain & Co) no longer rely solely on traditional search to learn about brands. If a potential client asks ChatGPT or Claude about your solution, do you know what it says? Is it recommending you? Or your competitor? Until now, this was a blind spot. Not anymore. Join us on Dec 3 for an exclusive executive luncheon with Amplitude. We are unveiling the new AI Visibility framework—the first tool designed to measure your standing in the age of LLMs. Exclusive for attendees: We will be generating a Custom AI Visibility Report for your brand, showing you exactly how you rank in AI-generated answers today. Stop guessing. Start measuring. 👉 Request your seat here (Private Dining): https://hubs.la/Q03W0Vx50 Event details in comment. hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AEO hashtag #AIAnalytics hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingStrategy
item.content:encoded: The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war? It’s the nightmare scenario for every digital leader: You rank #1 on Google, but your traffic is flat. Why? Because the user never clicked. They got their answer from an AI summary and moved on. The data confirms the shift: 📉 Zero-click searches are skyrocketing. 📉 CTRs are plummeting as AI overviews take over. 📉 80% of consumers (Bain & Co) no longer rely solely on traditional search to learn about brands. If a potential client asks ChatGPT or Claude about your solution, do you know what it says? Is it recommending you? Or your competitor? Until now, this was a blind spot. Not anymore. Join us on Dec 3 for an exclusive executive luncheon with Amplitude. We are unveiling the new AI Visibility framework—the first tool designed to measure your standing in the age of LLMs. Exclusive for attendees: We will be generating a Custom AI Visibility Report for your brand, showing you exactly how you rank in AI-generated answers today. Stop guessing. Start measuring. 👉 Request your seat here (Private Dining): https://hubs.la/Q03W0Vx50 Event details in comment. hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AEO hashtag #AIAnalytics hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingStrategy

item.title:
If you live in HubSpot all day, you know the pain:
Claude gives you a smart insight… and you still ...
item.description: If you live in HubSpot all day, you know the pain: Claude gives you a smart insight… and you still have to click around HubSpot to actually do anything with it. 😅 Not anymore. Claude 🤝 HubSpot = Real AI CRM Assistant With the new Claude–HubSpot upgrade, you can now: 🔸 Create / update contacts, deals, tasks, notes directly from Claude 🔸 Let Claude read real engagement history (emails, calls, meetings, tasks, notes) 🔸 Go from insight ➜ action in one step Why it matters: - ⚡ Work faster – no more breaking flow to “update later” - 🧠 Better insights – Claude sees full deal context - 🧾 Less admin – if Claude finds it, Claude can update it - 🎯 Smarter decisions – CRM finally feels alive At DAL (Digital Action Lab by Master Concept Group), we’re already helping teams in HK & TW plug Claude into HubSpot and turn it into a real GTM copilot, not just a database. Want Claude working inside your HubSpot, not just beside it? 👉 DM us and we’ll show you what’s possible. hashtag #DigitalActionLab hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #ClaudeAI hashtag #RevOps hashtag #MarketingAutomation
item.content:encoded: If you live in HubSpot all day, you know the pain: Claude gives you a smart insight… and you still have to click around HubSpot to actually do anything with it. 😅 Not anymore. Claude 🤝 HubSpot = Real AI CRM Assistant With the new Claude–HubSpot upgrade, you can now: 🔸 Create / update contacts, deals, tasks, notes directly from Claude 🔸 Let Claude read real engagement history (emails, calls, meetings, tasks, notes) 🔸 Go from insight ➜ action in one step Why it matters: - ⚡ Work faster – no more breaking flow to “update later” - 🧠 Better insights – Claude sees full deal context - 🧾 Less admin – if Claude finds it, Claude can update it - 🎯 Smarter decisions – CRM finally feels alive At DAL (Digital Action Lab by Master Concept Group), we’re already helping teams in HK & TW plug Claude into HubSpot and turn it into a real GTM copilot, not just a database. Want Claude working inside your HubSpot, not just beside it? 👉 DM us and we’ll show you what’s possible. hashtag #DigitalActionLab hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #ClaudeAI hashtag #RevOps hashtag #MarketingAutomation

item.title: Static campaigns are dead. Long live the Loop. 🔄 Incredible energy at our "Beyond the Funnel" execut...
item.description: Static campaigns are dead. Long live the Loop. 🔄 Incredible energy at our "Beyond the Funnel" executive luncheon! We spent the afternoon with Hong Kong’s marketing elite, dismantling the old way of planning and building the new Adaptive AI Engine for 2026. The highlight? Seeing the lightbulbs go on when we demonstrated how HubSpot’s Loop Marketing solves the biggest pain point leaders face today: ⚡ Speed. ⚡ 🌟 Star Speakers: ✨ Carol Fong, HubSpot's Head of Sales, Asia, showed us why the funnel is broken and how the Loop helps you adapt in real-time. ✨ James B. Lindsay Lindsay, Master Concept Group Concept's Director of Analytics, showed us exactly how to connect the data to make that engine run. To everyone who joined us: Thank you for the heated discussion and the insights. To those who couldn't make it: We are already planning the next one. Make sure you’re on the list. 🚀 Nico Ng Christine Leung hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #HKBusiness
item.content:encoded: Static campaigns are dead. Long live the Loop. 🔄 Incredible energy at our "Beyond the Funnel" executive luncheon! We spent the afternoon with Hong Kong’s marketing elite, dismantling the old way of planning and building the new Adaptive AI Engine for 2026. The highlight? Seeing the lightbulbs go on when we demonstrated how HubSpot’s Loop Marketing solves the biggest pain point leaders face today: ⚡ Speed. ⚡ 🌟 Star Speakers: ✨ Carol Fong, HubSpot's Head of Sales, Asia, showed us why the funnel is broken and how the Loop helps you adapt in real-time. ✨ James B. Lindsay Lindsay, Master Concept Group Concept's Director of Analytics, showed us exactly how to connect the data to make that engine run. To everyone who joined us: Thank you for the heated discussion and the insights. To those who couldn't make it: We are already planning the next one. Make sure you’re on the list. 🚀 Nico Ng Christine Leung hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #HKBusiness

item.title:
Is your brand invisible to ChatGPT? 🤖
📉 Google search volume is dropping. 📈 AI answers are skyrock...
item.description: Is your brand invisible to ChatGPT? 🤖 📉 Google search volume is dropping. 📈 AI answers are skyrocketing. If you aren't optimizing for AI citations, you aren't just losing traffic—you're vanishing from the conversation. Do you know where you rank against your competitors in AI search right now? We do. And we’ll show you. 🌟 Join DAL & Amplitude for an exclusive lunch. 🚀 We’ll teach you how to win the "GEO" war. 🌟 Plus, you’ll walk away with a free Custom "AI Visibility Report" to fix your gaps immediately. Don't fly blind. Grab your invite.
item.content:encoded: Is your brand invisible to ChatGPT? 🤖 📉 Google search volume is dropping. 📈 AI answers are skyrocketing. If you aren't optimizing for AI citations, you aren't just losing traffic—you're vanishing from the conversation. Do you know where you rank against your competitors in AI search right now? We do. And we’ll show you. 🌟 Join DAL & Amplitude for an exclusive lunch. 🚀 We’ll teach you how to win the "GEO" war. 🌟 Plus, you’ll walk away with a free Custom "AI Visibility Report" to fix your gaps immediately. Don't fly blind. Grab your invite.

item.title:
🫣 Is Your Marketing Campaign Catching Up with the AI-driven trends?
🔎 Running traditional, linear c...
item.description: 🫣 Is Your Marketing Campaign Catching Up with the AI-driven trends? 🔎 Running traditional, linear campaigns is like navigating with an outdated map—by the time you act, the opportunity is gone. 👋 Join our HubSpot and Master Concept Group to grow INBOUND sales with HubSpot AI.
item.content:encoded: 🫣 Is Your Marketing Campaign Catching Up with the AI-driven trends? 🔎 Running traditional, linear campaigns is like navigating with an outdated map—by the time you act, the opportunity is gone. 👋 Join our HubSpot and Master Concept Group to grow INBOUND sales with HubSpot AI.

item.title:
Is it CDP vs. CRM, or CDP + CRM? 🤔
💸 Most businesses are leaving potential revenue on the table by ...
item.description:
Is it CDP vs. CRM, or CDP + CRM? 🤔
💸 Most businesses are leaving potential revenue on the table by underestimating the power of modern customer data strategies.
The reality is, in a world where customer footprints span websites, apps, and social media, traditional CRMs are hitting their limits. Forward-thinking B2B enterprises in Hong Kong, Taiwan & China are now turning to a new powerhouse: the Customer Data Platform (CDP).
Discover why these two aren't an either/or choice, but complementary partners essential for: ➡️ Building a true 360° customer view ➡️ Delivering hyper-personalized experiences ➡️ Accelerating revenue growth & LTV
Stop guessing, start knowing. We break down the core differences, use cases, and how to choose the right solution for your business.
See the link to our full guide in comment.
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan
item.content:encoded:
Is it CDP vs. CRM, or CDP + CRM? 🤔
💸 Most businesses are leaving potential revenue on the table by underestimating the power of modern customer data strategies.
The reality is, in a world where customer footprints span websites, apps, and social media, traditional CRMs are hitting their limits. Forward-thinking B2B enterprises in Hong Kong, Taiwan & China are now turning to a new powerhouse: the Customer Data Platform (CDP).
Discover why these two aren't an either/or choice, but complementary partners essential for: ➡️ Building a true 360° customer view ➡️ Delivering hyper-personalized experiences ➡️ Accelerating revenue growth & LTV
Stop guessing, start knowing. We break down the core differences, use cases, and how to choose the right solution for your business.
See the link to our full guide in comment.
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan

item.title:
究竟是 CDP 或 CRM 的對決，還是 CDP 加 CRM 的組合？ 🤔 💸 大多數企業因低估了現代客戶數據策略的力量，正錯失著潛在的巨大收益。
事實上，在客戶足跡遍佈網站、App 和社交媒體的時...
item.description:
究竟是 CDP 或 CRM 的對決，還是 CDP 加 CRM 的組合？ 🤔 💸 大多數企業因低估了現代客戶數據策略的力量，正錯失著潛在的巨大收益。
事實上，在客戶足跡遍佈網站、App 和社交媒體的時代，傳統 CRM 已漸見瓶頸。具前瞻性的香港、台灣及大中華區 B2B 企業，正將目光轉向一個全新的強大引擎：客戶數據平台 (CDP)。
立即了解為何這兩者「不是二選一，而是相輔相成的好拍檔」，更是實現以下目標的關鍵： ➡️ 建立真正的 360 度客戶全方位視圖 ➡️ 提供超個人化的客戶體驗 ➡️ 加速營收增長與顧客終身價值 (LTV)
告別猜測，開始精準洞察。 我們將為您深入拆解兩者的核心差異、應用場景，並提供最適合您企業的選擇建議。
完整文章指南，連結請見留言區。
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing
hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan
item.content:encoded:
究竟是 CDP 或 CRM 的對決，還是 CDP 加 CRM 的組合？ 🤔 💸 大多數企業因低估了現代客戶數據策略的力量，正錯失著潛在的巨大收益。
事實上，在客戶足跡遍佈網站、App 和社交媒體的時代，傳統 CRM 已漸見瓶頸。具前瞻性的香港、台灣及大中華區 B2B 企業，正將目光轉向一個全新的強大引擎：客戶數據平台 (CDP)。
立即了解為何這兩者「不是二選一，而是相輔相成的好拍檔」，更是實現以下目標的關鍵： ➡️ 建立真正的 360 度客戶全方位視圖 ➡️ 提供超個人化的客戶體驗 ➡️ 加速營收增長與顧客終身價值 (LTV)
告別猜測，開始精準洞察。 我們將為您深入拆解兩者的核心差異、應用場景，並提供最適合您企業的選擇建議。
完整文章指南，連結請見留言區。
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing
hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan

item.title:
🌇 Sunset Yacht Gathering with VWO & Master Concept 🥂
Some of the best ideas don’t come from boardro...
item.description: 🌇 Sunset Yacht Gathering with VWO & Master Concept 🥂 Some of the best ideas don’t come from boardrooms or slide decks, they come from real conversations, in the right setting. That’s what this evening is about. On September 25th, VWO and Master Concept Group are hosting a yacht networking event in Hong Kong, gathering a small circle of leaders driving growth and innovation in their industries. It’s a rare chance to step away from the routine, share experiences, and build meaningful connections while watching the sun set over Victoria Harbour. ⛵ Only 20 leaders are joining us, and we’d love for you to be one of them. Registration link in comment. Block your spot now.
item.content:encoded: 🌇 Sunset Yacht Gathering with VWO & Master Concept 🥂 Some of the best ideas don’t come from boardrooms or slide decks, they come from real conversations, in the right setting. That’s what this evening is about. On September 25th, VWO and Master Concept Group are hosting a yacht networking event in Hong Kong, gathering a small circle of leaders driving growth and innovation in their industries. It’s a rare chance to step away from the routine, share experiences, and build meaningful connections while watching the sun set over Victoria Harbour. ⛵ Only 20 leaders are joining us, and we’d love for you to be one of them. Registration link in comment. Block your spot now.

item.title:
Your marketing funnel is broken.
Customers don’t follow your neatly planned journey anymore—they fo...
item.description:
Your marketing funnel is broken.
Customers don’t follow your neatly planned journey anymore—they follow their feeds. With AI-powered search providing instant answers, the old way of pulling users through a linear funnel is failing.
So, what's the solution? It's not a better funnel; it's a smarter shape. We broke down HubSpot's new "Loop Marketing" playbook in this carousel to show you:
➡️ Why 60% of Google searches ending in zero clicks is a wake-up call. ➡️ How the AI-powered Loop model learns, adapts, and converts in real-time. ➡️ The tangible business results for enterprises here in Hong Kong. ➡️ Our Take: What it really takes to build a successful loop.
Swipe through to see the future of marketing.
Start your Loop Marketing: https://lnkd.in/gH_sihRS WhatsApp Us: https://wa.me/85263168019
hashtag #LoopMarketing hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #AIinMarketing hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #MarTech hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #DAL hashtag #HongKong
item.content:encoded:
Your marketing funnel is broken.
Customers don’t follow your neatly planned journey anymore—they follow their feeds. With AI-powered search providing instant answers, the old way of pulling users through a linear funnel is failing.
So, what's the solution? It's not a better funnel; it's a smarter shape. We broke down HubSpot's new "Loop Marketing" playbook in this carousel to show you:
➡️ Why 60% of Google searches ending in zero clicks is a wake-up call. ➡️ How the AI-powered Loop model learns, adapts, and converts in real-time. ➡️ The tangible business results for enterprises here in Hong Kong. ➡️ Our Take: What it really takes to build a successful loop.

item.title:
🎉 Our Success at MarTech Summit 2025 with HubSpot & OneSignal!
What an incredible experience at th...
item.description: 🎉 Our Success at MarTech Summit 2025 with HubSpot & OneSignal! What an incredible experience at the MarTech Summit 2025 Hong Kong yesterday! Our booth was absolutely buzzing with engaging conversations and innovative ideas. It was fantastic to connect with so many B2B leaders from Hong Kong, Taiwan, and China who are keen on maximizing customer engagement. At DAL (Digital Action Lab) by Master Concept, we're thrilled to showcase the powerful synergy between two of our core solutions: @HubSpot (the CRM powerhouse) and @OneSignal (the leading communication and marketing automation tool). This is exactly what sparked so many "aha!" moments at the summit. 👍 A huge thank you to YoungJin Seo & Jessie Ko from OneSignal and Kin Weng Tan & Gracie Z. from HubSpot for their incredible support and making the event a success! 📢 Are you a B2B mid-market or enterprise client looking to boost engagement, accelerate sales cycles, and achieve data-driven growth? Let's connect! We're here to help you implement and optimize this powerful combination for your success. Talk to us! https://lnkd.in/gNx59JTy Nico Ng James B. Lindsay Emily Fan Kurt Chan Suee Poon hashtag #MarTechSummit hashtag #AppNotifications hashtag #CRM hashtag #MarketingHub hashtag #Hubspot hashtag #OneSignal

Our booth was absolutely buzzing with engaging conversations and innovative ideas. It was fantastic to connect with so many B2B leaders from Hong Kong, Taiwan, and China who are keen on maximizing customer engagement. At DAL (Digital Action Lab) by Master Concept, we're thrilled to showcase the powerful synergy between two of our core solutions: @HubSpot (the CRM powerhouse) and @OneSignal (the leading communication and marketing automation tool).
